subcodes.first_line: O My Most Exalted Pen! Verily, We behold thee hastening across the Tablet, now inclining to the right, and at another moment to the left [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلمی الاعلی انا نراک ترکض فی اللوح مره تمیل الی الیمین و اخری الی
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @blind imitation [taqlid], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
